issues: Jaguar XFL (2020-2025): China-only long-wheelbase XF. DB has no tire data - should use XF tire sizes.
Jaguar XJ (2020-2022): Production ended 2019. Invalid years in database.
Jaguar XJ (2010-2019): All use staggered tire setups. Current DB shows non-staggered sizes.
Jaguar XJ (2000-2003): Current data shows future generation sizes (20", 21"). These are X308 platform using 17"/18" wheels.
Jaguar XK (2000-2015): All entries missing current data despite being sold in US.
Jaguar XF (2007): XF production started 2008 MY in most markets. Year may be incorrect.
Jeep Cherokee (2024-2026): Production ended 2023. Invalid years.
Jeep Cherokee (2002-2012): US-market name was 'Liberty'. Database uses international name.
Jeep Cherokee (2014-2022): Current data includes non-OEM aftermarket sizes.
